prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等热门专业社 会热度持续高位，该校相关专业（计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化、人工智能等）报考竞争较激烈；土木建筑类社会热度分化观望，该校土木工程专业位次相对靠后；本 省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 110868 人，按近年比例估算物理类约 79936 人，较 2025 年物理类 80421 人略降约 0.6%，考生总数微降对竞争有轻微缓解作用；省控线数据 2025 年物理类本科批 340 分，较 2024 年 345 分略降，难度变化不大；该校位于北京市，对吉林省考生有较强地域吸引力；university_home_province 为北京，非本省高校，无 local_enrollment_share 数据，跨省报考热度受北京城市效应支撑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 12467→10959→19992→13559→13530. In 2023, a gap occurred due to the provincial control line (ranking significantly dropped to 19992), quickly rebounded to 13559 in 2024, and stabilized at 13530 in 2025. Fluctuations in recent two years are small, with 2025 baseline around 13530. Provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 60 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 68 in 2024, 68 in 2025; 2026 plan is 69, a slight expansion of about 1.5% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition and putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science Chinese University main ranking approximately 76th (2026), stable at 76–77 in recent years. School level maintains stable attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, there was a negative evaluation due to a teacher ethics incident, but recent reputation signals have turned neutral/mixed; 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management responses, no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin platform exposure is average, not in top 100 overall rankings, no significant increase in application attention. The university is characterized by mining and safety, with Safety Science and Engineering as A+ discipline (same origin as Xuzhou campus), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-. Related majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, Civil Engineering benefit from disciplinary advantages and attract specific candidate groups.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of hot majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information remains high; related majors at this university (Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) face intense competition. Civil Engineering and Architecture social popularity is divided and waiting; this university's Civil Engineering major has relatively lower rankings. Provincial 2026 total Gaokao candidates approximately 110,868, estimated Physics Category about 79,936 based on recent proportions, slightly down about 0.6% from 2025's 80,421, a slight relief to competition. Provincial control line data: 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch 340 points, slightly down from 2024's 345 points, difficulty change is small. The university is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Jilin candidates. university_home_province is Beijing, not a local university, no local_enrollment_share data, cross-provincial application enthusiasm supported by Beijing city effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering stable recent two-year rankings around 13530, slight 2026 enrollment expansion of about 1.5%, slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates of about 0.6%, neutral and stable reputation, and differentiated major popularity; predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking approximately 13669, range 13169–14169.

Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 13169) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 13669) should target Tier 2 majors like Safety Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Mechanical, and also consider Business Administration; candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (beyond 14169) are advised to choose Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering, Geology, Chemical Engineering as safety options, while also paying attention to the university's industry-specific advantages.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1854→1752→2561→2138→2018, with a notable backward shift in 2023 (2561), a recovery to 2138 in 2024, and further recovery to 2018 in 2025, showing a restorative forward trend, with a baseline of about 2018 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021 and 8 from 2022 to 2025; the 2026 plan remains 8, unchanged for several consecutive years, with no additional pressure on rankings from enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 76th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in recent years, still attracting some liberal arts candidates; in 2022, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, but recent reputation signals have turned neutral/mixed; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; exposure on the Douyin platform is average, with no significant increase in application attention; the university is primarily engineering-focused, and its liberal arts majors (Administrative Management, English) lack directly corresponding A-class disciplines, limiting the appeal of its disciplinary strengths to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as English and Administrative Management is generally lukewarm, with no clear warming signals; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 30,932 in the History Category based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 0.4% from 31,071 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the provincial control line for the History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 384 points, up from 369 in 2024, indicating slightly increased difficulty; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Jilin candidates; cross-provincial applications are supported by Beijing's urban effect, and although liberal arts majors are not the university's strength, the Beijing location remains attractive.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the restorative forward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in provincial History Category candidates, and stable reputation; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2003, with a range of 1642–2364.

- English (only accepts English test takers).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2003, range 1642–2364. This university only offers two majors in the History Category in Jilin: English and Administrative Management, limiting major selection. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1642) can aim for English; those at or above the middle of the range are advised to use Administrative Management as a safety option. If you have a clear interest in language or public management, consider applying; otherwise, it is recommended to diversify choices with other institutions.
